transparency.description: Track your mining in real-time via blockchain. Every hash, every block, every satoshi is traceable. No empty promises.

security.description: Your funds are in multi-sig wallets with cold storage. Quarterly audits by independent firms. Bank-level protection.

support.title: 24/7 Human Support

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to your questions about our platform

items.question: What is cryptocurrency mining?
items.answer: Mining is the process of validating transactions on the blockchain and receiving cryptocurrency as a reward. With Mining Protocol, you rent the equipment and infrastructure, and we handle all the technical work for you.

items.question: How much can I earn?
items.answer: Returns vary based on the rented equipment and contract duration. Our clients report an average ROI of 8-15% per month. Longer contracts and larger investments offer superior returns.

items.question: Is it safe to invest?
items.answer: Yes. We use the best security practices in the market: multi-sig wallets, cold storage, quarterly audits, and bank-level protection. Your funds are always safe.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept PIX (automatically converted to USDT at the daily exchange rate) and direct USDT deposits on TRC20, ERC20, and Polygon networks.

items.question: Can I withdraw my money anytime?
items.answer: Yes! Your earnings can be withdrawn anytime, with no hidden fees. Withdrawals are processed within 24 business hours.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. We handle all the technical aspects: installation, configuration, maintenance, and optimization. You just need to choose your plan and track your earnings.

items.question: How does the affiliate program work?
items.answer: Refer friends and earn commissions across 5 levels: 10% on level 1, 5% on level 2, 3% on level 3, 2% on level 4, and 1% on level 5. Commissions are lifetime and paid instantly in USDT.

items.question: Do you issue invoices?
items.answer: Yes. All earnings are accompanied by electronic invoices, ensuring the fiscal regularity of your gains.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
